programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: A young girl witnesses the fiery death of an alien, but declares her belief that it was a vision. Classic sci-fi drama, starring Roy Thinnes

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: An old motor racing friend of Hooker is arrested for a series of hold-ups at local supermarkets, but the canny cop is not convinced of his guilt and sets out to bring the culprits to book - leading to a life-or-death chase round a secluded racetrack. Vintage American drama, starring William Shatner and Adrian Zmed

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Detective Sandovil finds himself in a compromising situation when a gun used to kill a police officer is found in his nephews room

programme.title: Blitz (2011)
programme.desc: An uncompromising police detectives career is under threat when his violent methods are exposed by a reporter. However, he is kept on duty as he is considered the only man capable of stopping an elusive serial killer, one who is preying on police officers. Crime thriller, starring Jason Statham, Aidan Gillen, Paddy Considine and David Morrissey

programme.title: The Negotiator (1998)
programme.desc: Hostage negotiator Danny Roman is framed for murder and turns the tables by taking captives of his own to ensure his pleas of innocence are heard. His colleague Chris Sabian is sent in to reason with him and save the hostages, leading to a battle of wits as Roman tries to persuade him to take his side. Thriller, starring Samuel L Jackson, Kevin Spacey, David Morse, JT Walsh and Paul Giamatti

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt (2014)
programme.desc: District attorney Mitch Brockden is involved in a fatal hit-and-run incident, and a convicted felon is charged with his crime. Mitchs guilt drives him to throw out the case when it comes to trial - but when the accused later goes on a killing spree, he feels compelled to bring him to justice personally. Crime thriller, starring Dominic Cooper and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: Money Plane (2020)
programme.desc: A professional thief who owes the mob money is forced to rob a futuristic flying casino filled with the worlds most dangerous criminals. Action, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Detective Sandovil finds himself in a compromising situation when a gun used to kill a police officer is found in his nephews room

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: An old motor racing friend of Hooker is arrested for a series of hold-ups at local supermarkets, but the canny cop is not convinced of his guilt and sets out to bring the culprits to book - leading to a life-or-death chase round a secluded racetrack. Vintage American drama, starring William Shatner and Adrian Zmed

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: A young girl witnesses the fiery death of an alien, but declares her belief that it was a vision. Classic sci-fi drama, starring Roy Thinnes

programme.title: Mammoth (2006)
programme.desc: A sleepy town is thrown into turmoil when a meteor strikes the local museum, bringing a woolly mammoth residing in one of the display cases to life. The ancient beast goes on a violent rampage, leaving the residents with the task of hunting it down before it escapes into the outside world. Sci-fi thriller, starring Vincent Ventresca, Summer Glau, Tom Skerritt and Cole Williams

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: Between Heaven and Hell (1956)
programme.desc: When the owner of a southern cotton plantation is drafted into the army during the Second World War, he is unable to curb his arrogance and clashes with his sadistic captain, who makes it his mission to reform the privates wayward attitude. Drama, starring Robert Wagner, Terry Moore, Broderick Crawford and Buddy Ebsen

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: Lancaster Skies (2019)
programme.desc: Douglas Miller, a broken flying ace, must overcome his past to lead a Lancaster bomber crew in the pivotal aerial war over Berlin in 1944. Drama, starring Jeffrey Mundell, Josh Collins and Rosa Coduri

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: Kirk and the Enterprise crew are sent on an emergency mission to find a cure for a deadly plague - but their efforts are hampered by a miners strike. Intergalactic escapades, with William Shatner and Leonard Nimoy

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: Two aliens on the run from the police beg Vincent for help in stopping the invasion. Classic sci-fi drama, starring Roy Thinnes

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: Vinces fellow cops - including Hooker - criticise him for not exacting revenge by shooting a fleeing juvenile responsible for killing an officer. William Shatner, Adrian Zmed and Heather Locklear star

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: The Rangers try to find out who attacked Trent - but there is only one witness

programme.title: Gold (2016)
programme.desc: A prospector desperate for a lucky break, teams up with a similarly eager geologist and sets off on a journey to find gold in a remote Indonesian jungle. However, as the risky expedition begins without a single speck of gold or the promise of it on the horizon, disease and failure begins to threaten the short-lived dream. Thriller, with Matthew McConaughey, Edgar Ramírez and Bryce Dallas Howard

programme.title: Dead Man Running (2009)
programme.desc: Reformed ex-convict Nick races against time to gather £100,000 to repay a loan shark before his mother is killed. Aided by his best friend Bing, he embarks on a series of increasingly desperate scams to collect the money before it is too late. Crime thriller, starring Tamer Hassan, Danny Dyer, Curtis 50 Cent Jackson, Monet Mazur, Brenda Blethyn and Blake Ritson

programme.title: Born to Raise Hell (2010)
programme.desc: An Interpol agent investigating a gang of Russian gun smugglers gets caught up in a shoot-out that leaves his partner dead. Swearing vengeance, he goes on the rampage through the Eastern European underworld to track down the gang members and carry out his own brand of justice. Action thriller, starring Steven Seagal and Dan Badarau

programme.title: Red (2008)
programme.desc: Elderly, reclusive widower Avery Ludlow is left distraught when his only companion in life - a 14-year-old dog named Red - is murdered by three teenagers. After tracking the youths down, Avery demands the parents take action against the youths but after being turned away, he decides to dish out justice by any means necessary. Thriller, starring Brian Cox, Noel Fisher, Tom Sizemore and Kyle Gallner

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A young man who has had a severe reaction to a recreational drug is wheeled into resus by paramedics, and senior sister Jen and the medical team face a challenge to calm their patient down so they can treat him. A 65-year-old woman is brought in by her best friends after hitting her head when she fell off a chair while playing bingo, and a 31-year-old man with multiple sclerosis is rushed in after developing a fever at home

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: Doctors fear for a man who has epilepsy after he fell and hit his head on concrete. Things escalate when he has a second seizure and stops breathing. A surfer may never walks again after crashing headfirst into a sandbank, and a doctor who used to be a professional rugby player spots something worrying in a vets x-ray

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Linden, 15, is brought to AandE having badly cut his leg while back-flipping off a shed roof onto a trampoline. As well as calling an ambulance, his friends filmed the accident on their mobile phones and happily show the clip to the staff at Kings. Junior doctor Sammy looks after 88-year-old Panayiota, who has been referred to hospital with breathing difficulties. Originally from Cyprus, the patient speaks very little English and Sammy has to contact a translator to help with the diagnosis and treatment. Meanwhile, 55-year-old lorry driver Antony has lost all feeling in his left leg, and an ultrasound scan reveals he needs emergency surgery on a blocked artery to save his limb

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Its a busy Mothers Day at south Londons Kings College Hospital as 23-year-old builder Jamie is rushed in by paramedics having fallen from the roof of a three-storey building, landing on a brick wall. The team performs an emergency ultrasound to determine whether he has suffered internal injuries or fractured his ribs and spine, and spot a punctured lung that needs to be reinflated. Four-month-old Weston has been brought to paediatric AandE after suffering from diarrhoea and vomiting for more than 24 hours, while doctors suspect David, 74, has had a stroke. Junior doctor Matt looks after 80-year-old Daphne, who has dislocated her replacement hip

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: Motorhome enthusiasts explore Britains luxury campsites. In North Yorkshire, campers indulge in some welly-wanging and take to the high seas on a pirate ship

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at the Coachman Inn in Hartford, Cheshire, where owner Justin Hyam surprises his guests with a romantic revelation at dinner and a breakfast bombshell

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Dumfries and Galloway, Simon OBrien and Henry Cole meet Alan, who works in the forestry business. Henry decides to give four bar stools a bright makeover, while Simon transforms two old sheep shearer seats into an extraordinary bench

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.sub-title: 2020: Chiclana de la Frontera, Costa de la Luz
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin goes house-hunting in and around the attractive Spanish town of Chiclana de la Frontera on the Costa de la Luz, with chauffeur company owner Steve and export co-ordinator Janice. They both have busy lives and cant wait to buy their own holiday home that they can escape to for relaxing getaways with their family. They have a budget of £160,000 and are looking for a three-bedroom villa with a pool near the beach

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the Manchester area, 27-year-old full-time mum Johanna, plans an evening dedicated to takeways from Turkey to China and India. Her guests are 34-year-old lorry driver Ryan, 48-year-old housewife Fiona, 45-year-old laundrette owner Linzi and 53-year-old translator Nico, on a night that includes a sojourn into Shakespeare

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Manchester, lorry-driving movie buff Ryan plans a film-inspired menu including his Prawn Identity starter, Sausage Meat the Fockers and Chocolate Clockwork Orange desert. Unfortunately the first course is more of a disaster movie for Johanna, who has to face her fear of prawns. Meanwhile, Nico puts the cat among the pigeons with his views on male chefs and Fiona takes Linzi to task over her beauty regime

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Glamorous domestic delegator Fiona aims to impress with a classy but effortless menu as she hosts the third dinner party of the week in the Manchester area. However, critical Linzi takes issue with Fionas mother chopping her vegetables and her cousin making her honeycomb. Then, theres more trouble brewing as Nico and Johanna clash

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Critical laundrette owner Linzi has been a hard taskmaster all week in the Manchester area, so expects to show her guests where theyve been going wrong. Shes not pleased when Ryan questions her choice of starter. When the guests find out what Linzi does for a job, Nico struggles to understand the concept of a laundrette. Self-proclaimed domestic delegator Fiona has to face her fears during Linzis entertainment - an ironing competition

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night in the Manchester area, Nico plans to show the Brits how its done in the kitchen with his Italian cooking. Hes been talking up his Italian heritage all week, and Linzis convinced hes heading for a fall. Ryans shocked by some of Nicos locker-room tales, while baby of the group Johanna horrifies the other female contestants with her thoughts on gender politics. It remains to be seen who will pick up the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Grove Barn BandB in Denton, Norfolk, where owners Steph and Alan Flight hope that their approach to cleanliness will lead to good feedback from their guests. However, visitors Scott and Alistair make a discovery in the bathroom that leaves them with a sinking feeling. And theres confusion in the kitchen at breakfast time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second episode comes from Picaroons in Sheringham, Norfolk, where problems with the plumbing and a disastrous breakfast lead to harsh words between the hosts and their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Brightham House in Malborough, Devon, where couple Scott Browning and Alastair Veness hope to impress their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at Morans BandB in Westward Ho!, Devon, owned by ultra-chic retirees John and Jaqueline, although the lack of an en-suite does not impress Christine and Ian

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the competition sees the BandB owners meet for the last time to find out how much theyve been paid and to settle some scores. Grove Barn owners Steph and Alan have some hair-raising issues up for discussion after the cleaning critique they received

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to Fife in Scotland to fix up a 1993 Toyota Supra MK4, owned by former competitive motorcycle racer Lisa, who, after a road accident, is no longer able to ride her beloved bikes. Her ongoing mobility problems have meant that the car has ended up in need of TLC. Lisas friends and family hope a fully restored car will lift her spirits

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to Kent to rescue a much-loved 1973 Dennis fire engine. It used to belong to New Romney station, where firefighter Tony cherished it. He later bought it to restore and to use for charity fundraising. Alas, Tony died from cancer and never completed the restoration and his colleagues have nominated his son James for the Car S.O.S treatment, so that he can see his fathers wishes come true

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer search for properties in south and east London. Sisters Ruth and Anna are pooling funds, while Aba, also a first-time buyer, confesses to champagne tastes, but lemonade money

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer catch up with Lucia and Matt, who were split over what to do with their four-bed detached home in Royal Wootton Bassett, Wiltshire. With four cats, two dogs and a yard full of hens, the house was at bursting point. Kirstie heads to the pairs new home in Llangammarch Wells, Powys, where huge changes have occurred, including the addition of a peacock to the household menagerie. Do Lucia and Matt feel they got the life they really wanted after all?

programme.title: Our Farm Next Door: Amanda, Clive and Kids
programme.desc: Amanda Owen and her family continue the task of turning an abandoned farmhouse into a 21st-century home. Its summer in Swaledale and the renovation of Anty Johns is about to hit its one-year anniversary, with plenty of work still to do for Richard the builder and the Owen family. For the kids, the summer holidays mean picnics and playing in the stream, but dad Clive is laid low by a hip operation

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Staff nurse Graeme is attacked by a prisoner who has been brought to Kings College Hospital for treatment and the team has to restrain the patient before giving him the care he needs. Father-of-two Tony, 59, is rushed in by helicopter medics following a head-on traffic collision, 85-year-old Eric arrives with ongoing stomach problems and 79-year-old Jim, who is experiencing breathing difficulties, quickly strikes up a rapport with the female staff and muses on what it means to be a gentleman

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: On a busy Saturday night at Kings College Hospital, staff have to juggle the needs of elderly patients and sick children alongside those who are drunk or violent. Paramedics bring 12-year-old Grace into resus after she falls down a flight of stairs, while Sarah and Andy are concerned for their 10-month-old son Dexter, who has a high temperature and is unresponsive. Elsewhere, clinical site manager Gordon has a series of tests as a result of senior sister Jen noticing his bloodshot eye

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Oxfordshire, the heli-medics are dispatched to a motocross track where Mike has come off his bike, falling over 10 feet, and is experiencing altered sensations in both legs. In another motorcycle accident, Luke suffers a serious femur fracture and a piece of his bone is lying on the road. Near Kendal, Moon has a tonic-clonic seizure and theres drama on the ambulance journey to hospital

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Staff nurse Graeme is attacked by a prisoner who has been brought to Kings College Hospital for treatment and the team has to restrain the patient before giving him the care he needs. Father-of-two Tony, 59, is rushed in by helicopter medics following a head-on traffic collision, 85-year-old Eric arrives with ongoing stomach problems and 79-year-old Jim, who is experiencing breathing difficulties, quickly strikes up a rapport with the female staff and muses on what it means to be a gentleman

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE

A 65-year-old woman is brought in by her best friends after hitting her head when she fell off a chair while playing bingo, and a 31-year-old man with multiple sclerosis is rushed in after developing a fever at home

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: The camping enthusiasts tour of North Yorkshire brings them to The Hideaway, a tranquil eco-friendly site at Baxby Manor, where they learn to forage for food and take to the skies

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The Foxhall Village Guest House in Blackpool is this weeks second venue, where the food falls short of expectations and not everyone has a good nights sleep

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien head to Dumfries and Galloway, where they find an electric organ and a vintage oil dispenser in barns that are brimming with junk

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Maureen has holidayed in the charming, whitewashed town of Mojácar on the Costa de Almería for nearly 30 years and feels the time is right to make the big move and retire there permanently. Maureen would love to find a two-bedroom property with a terrace and sea views for her budget of £90,000. With Maureens brother-in-law Dave coming along to lend his support, Scarlette Douglas sets out to deliver the ideal place

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This contest takes place in and around Swindon and Marlborough, where the first to host is super-confident software salesman Simon, who hopes to impress with a fun night full of charm and hearty, home-cooked meals. On the receiving end of his charm offensive are French tutor Saleha, drama teacher Ben, business consultant Linda; and retiree Debstakes place in and around Swindon and Marlborough, where the first to host is super-confident software salesman Simon. Simon hopes to impress with a fun night full of charm and hearty, home cooked meals. On the receiving end of his charm offensive are French tutor Saleha; drama teacher Ben, business consultant Linda and retiree Debs

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Second to host in the West Country is business consultant Linda, who is looking to impress her guests with a game menu of pheasant, venison and pastry swans

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Parisienne Saleha hosts the third dinner party of the week in Swindon and Marlborough, serving up a largely vegetarian meal, but with a side of steak tartare

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the fourth day in Swindon and Marlborough, drama teacher Ben is putting on a Middle Eastern and Asian-inspired menu in an effort to win the £1,000

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final day in the West Country, retired military police officer Debs plans to treat her guests to a medieval feast of local legends including flying monk, fish platter and lamb leg of barmaid-gobbled tiger

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at BnB at 43 in Richmond, North Yorkshire, where Jenny and Johnny Hatch hope their guests will enjoy a home-from-home experience

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Dazzling decor and cleanliness concerns give guests opposing views of Sutton Park in Blackpool, before a breakfast buffet comes under scrutiny in the morning

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: For the third visit this week, the group head to Edburton in West Sussex, and Tottington Manor, where owners Debra and Jamie Tombs claim to offer the Manor House experience

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at Flynns Pub and Guesthouse in Hackney, east London, run by friends Serena and Kelly, who pride themselves on having clean and stylish rooms

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It is the final day and the BandB owners meet for the last time to settle some scores. Jenny and Johnny want to get to the bottom of the stain on Kelly and Serenas stay

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to Manchester to rescue a Citroen HY van, which 19-year-old Darcie and her mother Alison bought so that they could start a mobile catering business. Sadly, the dream was shattered when Alison was killed in the Manchester Arena bombing in 2017. Former England footballers Bryan Robson and Wes Brown join in to help restore the fortunes of a family torn apart by tragic events

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw head to Stockport to take on a 1994 Vauxhall Cavalier Turbo owned by Darren, who is unable to move from the neck down after an accident. With the car gathering dust on the drive, Darrens friends are hoping Fuzz and Tim can convert it to allow him to be a passenger and satisfy his need for speed again

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In Bath, Kirstie Allsopp meets first time buyers Laura and Phil, who are desperate to make the move from shared living to a home of their own. Meanwhile, Phil Spencer goes property searching with downsizing duo Kerrie and Dave, who sold their beloved barn conversion to move closer to their kids

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer return to find out how some of the families they have helped are getting on since they decided whether to redesign their problematic homes or sell up and move on. They begin with Paul and Dawn from the first edition back in April 2015, who were at loggerheads over what to do with their detached country home. Its isolated location on the outskirts of Huddersfield made it perfect for astronomy fanatic Paul, but Dawn was desperate to move, hating its dysfunctional layout

programme.title: Great Estates from Above
programme.desc: This episode explores the 10,000-acre Castle Howard Estate in Yorkshire as it races to complete a massive renovation ahead of its spring opening to the public. The Howard family and their team of dedicated staff and volunteers work to transform the historic interiors while, outside, a 440-acre rewilding project is underway and a herd of goats do their bit to conserve the land

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Schizophrenic Graham, 75, is brought to Kings College Hospital after being stabbed in the neck by a stranger on his doorstep, and needs a CT scan to reveal the extent of his wound. Former nursery nurse Pat, 89, also arrives on the ward, having been found at the bottom of the stairs at home with no recollection of how she got there, while palliative care nurse Tracey treats 72-year-old retired postman Michael, who was recently diagnosed with lung cancer

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Medics at Kings College Hospital treat 79-year-old Arthur, who has been brought into resus with acute stomach discomfort and has several underlying conditions that could be to blame. Meanwhile, 20-year-old wine merchant Tom is rushed into AandE after collapsing with sharp chest pains and breathing difficulties, and retired soldier Rockey is concerned about his blurred vision

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The air ambulance crews race to help a teenage motorcyclist who has been hit by a car and catapulted into the air - suffering multiple fractures to his legs and arms. On holiday in Cumbria, a man collapses while working out and his stepdaughter performs CPR to try to keep him alive. A driver suffers a nasty leg wound after being hit from behind on the M40 - and to make matters worse, he is trapped in his lorry

programme.title: Car S.O.S.

programme.desc: How, in 2017, divers along the Tunisian coast made the discovery of the submerged ancient ruins of a vital Roman outpost, heralding the mystery of Romes sunken city

programme.title: The Rise and Fall of the Rust Belt
programme.desc: Recounting the story of the Rust Belt, running through Pennsylvania, West Virginia, Ohio, Indiana and the lower peninsula of Michigan, ending in Illinois, Iowa and Wisconsin. What was once the hub of the American industrial revolution and innovation fell into decline in the 1970s as competition from abroad, economic crises and automation took their toll. Part one of two

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: Hitler takes an enormous gamble as Nazi forces fight the war on two fronts, braving the worst winter in memory to tackle the Allies to the west in the Ardenne Forest of Belgium and Luxemburg as the Russian army gets closer to Berlin. In the Philippines thousands of prisoners starve while they await liberation at the Japanese Santo Tomas internment camp in Manila

programme.title: Inside Japans War
programme.desc: An insight into Imperial Japans military motives, culture, startling initial success as an aggressor, and eventual dramatic downfall, beginning as the Empire of Japan rises on the international stage

programme.title: Long Lost Family

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Minnie Drivers parents were not married, but all the time they were together her father had a wife and another family. The actress didnt know this until she was older, and now she embarks on a quest to learn more about her dads background. She begins by discovering he was awarded a medal for his role in the Battle of Heligoland Bight during the Second World War - but why did he throw it away? Minnies trail to unravel the mystery leads her to relatives she never knew existed, as well as a kindred spirit

programme.title: Born That Way
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of Patrick Lydon, through interviews with him in his final year. Patrick reflects on a life that took him from a a budding career in rock journalism in America to trailblazing, with his wife, Gladys, the development in Ireland of the radically inclusive Camphill Movement. His story calls forth the story of Camphill itself and articulates an approach to life that struggles for survival in todays consumerist climate

programme.title: Hitlers Gold
programme.desc: In Munich, in September 1919, history was about to be changed by a penniless army corporal thirsty to avenge his adoptive motherland. Thirteen years later, Adolf Hitler would be saluted as the saviour of the German nation. This episode examines the covert financial web that Hitler spun across Europe and around the globe to bankroll his dream of world domination

programme.title: Amanda and Alans Spanish Job
programme.desc: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr embark on their first ever Spanish renovation job. Hoping to breathe new life into one of Andalusias forgotten villages, Amanda takes a gamble on a run-down three-storey townhouse and convinces Alan to help her to transform it into a boutique BandB. In a bid to push their DIY skills to a whole new level, the pair visit Granadas architectural marvel and the pinnacle of Moorish design - the Alhambra Palace. However, with over 2,000 square feet to contend with, a roof in need of repair and a crumbling outbuilding on its last legs, it seems they may be in over their heads

programme.title: Amanda and Alans Spanish Job
programme.desc: Amanda Holden and Alan Carr set about designing a Spanish dining room and foyer. Alans dreams of a lavish reception area are soon quashed when Amanda suggests his special space should be a cupboard under the stairs. To get some impressive design inspiration, the duo head to the outskirts of Vejer to a boutique hotel filled with local salvaged treasures. Amanda also visits the largest reclamation yard in Andalusia to upcycle an old Spanish door into a statement dining table, but Alan fears she may have taken her upcycling too far and is bluntly honest with his friend

programme.title: Hell for Leather: The Story of Gaelic Football
programme.desc: Mick OConnell discusses his own legacy and the future of Gaelic football. The documentary also explores Mick ODwyers moves towards unprecedented success, the re-emergence of the sleeping giants of Mayo and the appearance of women on the frontline in the 1970s

programme.title: Home Rescue: The Big Fix

programme.title: Mancháns Europe by Train
programme.desc: Manchán Magan continues his journey across the continent, stopping off in Berlin, where he dines on an array of dishes made with protein-packed insects. In Prague, he learns about fruit foraging in the city and meets two sisters with a passion for baking. When Manchán arrives in Budapest, he heads straight to the public baths before exploring the city

programme.title: Rising Tides: Irelands Future in a Warmer World
programme.desc: Philip Boucher-Hayes investigates what kinds of adaptations the human race need to survive and thrive into the future, such as a planned retreat to another hospitable planet. He explores how we can adapt to new wildfire seasons, learning from the experts in Spain. Philip also travels to The Netherlands, and learns how to build world class coastal defences to combat the rising seas

programme.title: Mozart: Genius for Hire
programme.desc: The story of how the composer broke free from the constraints of court employment to embrace a risky life as Viennas pioneering freelancer, defying tradition to compose, teach and perform on his own terms. The tale is told through letters between Mozart and his father Leopold, read by Matthew Broome and David Harewood

programme.desc: A good Samaritan helps a newlywed couple with a flat tyre, but when the groom accidentally dirties the mans suit, the stranger reveals his true self

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: The life and work of Ron Howard, whose films include Splash, Cocoon, Apollo 13, Frost/Nixon, Cinderella Man, Rush, and A Beautiful Mind, for which he won two Oscars

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A profile of the American actor, who won Oscars for his roles in All the Presidents Men and Julia, and also starred in Melvin and Howard and Magnolia

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: Two archaeologists get less than they bargained for while trying to steal a priceless treasure from a tomb. Starring Nigel Havers and Richard Johnson

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A would-be burglar is confused when his intended victim - an elderly lady - appears to befriend him. Drama, with Siobhan McKenna and Patrick Field

programme.title: Phil Collins: Going Back to Detroit
programme.desc: The singer explores the roots and legacy of Detroits unique music scene in the 1960s and 70s, as he joins the Funk Brothers to record an album of his favourite Motown hits

programme.title: Skinner and Minas Literary Road Trip: Pope and Swift
programme.desc: Frank Skinner and Denise Mina follow in the footsteps of Alexander Pope and Jonathan Swift, two of the most brilliant humorists in the history of literature. Ian Hislop tells them how the two created satire that still influences writers today, before Frank and Denise explore the remains of Popes grotto

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: A look at the life and work of American film-maker William Friedkin, who won an Academy Award for directing The French Connection and was nominated for The Exorcist

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A glimpse into the life and career of the Oscar-winning Hollywood actor who starred in The Goodbye Girl, Jaws and Down and Out in Beverly Hills

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.sub-title: The Boy Who Talked with Animals
programme.desc: A father buys his son a giant turtle, but is concerned about what the boy will do with it

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A man seeks advice from his sponging friend on how to woo his bosss daughter. Drama, starring Michael Kitchen

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man who reads too much pulp fiction finds himself playing Sir Galahad to a woman in the flat downstairs, where it seems she is burdened with a corpse

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: District attorney Martin Ross is running for governor and learns that his brother Richard has killed rival candidate Burton Reeves

programme.title: Stories from Tate Britain
programme.desc: Part one of two. Kate Bryan goes behind the scenes at the gallery, finding out about the origins of Tate Britain and the development of modern art in the UK. She meets director Maria Balshaw to hear about the different Tate sites and how they interconnect, and explores the life and work of William Blake before finding out about Elizabeth Siddal, the woman behind the Pre-Raphaelite Brotherhood

programme.title: Spymasters: The Great Spy Writers
programme.desc: The lives and secrets of spy authors in literature and film, featuring the work of Rudyard Kipling, John Buchan and Graham Greene, as well as clips from Michael Caine movie The Ipcress File - based on a book by Len Deighton

programme.title: Sean Connery vs James Bond
programme.desc: The impact of the Bond role on the actors career, examining his later career choices as he sought to redefine masculinity beyond the suave, ruthless spy

programme.title: Harold Lloyd: Hollywoods Timeless Comedy Genius
programme.desc: Documentary about the life of the actor, comedian, director and stunt performer, who made almost 200 movies and was a huge star of the silent film era

programme.title: Boy George and Culture Club
programme.desc: A profile of the band, with members Boy George, Roy Hay, Mikey Craig and Jon Moss talking about the personal relationships behind the scenes

programme.title: Portrait Artist of the Year
programme.desc: Stephen Mangan and Joan Bakewell present a special feature-length episode in which nine previous winners return to the Battersea Arts Centre to paint actress Judi Dench

programme.title: Sky Arts from Hay
programme.desc: Pulitzer Prize-winning American novelist Barbara Kingsolver and comedian-turned-author Fats Timbo discuss their work and influences at the festival

programme.title: Laurie Lee: The Lost Interview
programme.desc: Documentary featuring the only TV interview ever given by the Cider with Rosie author, including the story of how it was secured by local TV producer David Parker

programme.title: Inside Art
programme.sub-title: Inside Art: Glyn Philpot at Pallant House
programme.desc: The first major exhibition of work by the British artist in nearly 40 years, charting his development from Edwardian society portraits to a radically modernist style in the 1930s

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: While Hank leads the search for Clark, Prior asks Danvers about the murder-suicide case that drove a wedge between her and Navarro. After sifting through the contents of Clarks trailer, Navarro and Danvers seek out a local hairdresser for insight on Annie, which leads to a tip about another former Tsalal worker. Later, tensions grow between Danvers and her stepdaughter Leah

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: As Danvers and Prior set out to learn more about Tsalal - and find an unlikely location for the physical evidence - Captain Connelly threatens to hand the case over to Anchorage. Later, Navarro and Danvers separately find a connection between one of the Tsalal men and Annie, prompting the former partners to agree to work the case together

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor returns to explore more of the worlds most luxurious hotels and begins in Miamis South Beach, home to some of the most hedonistic and extravagant establishments in America. At the Fontainebleau, he meets a man with eye-opening stories about Frank Sinatras regular visits and gets a shock when he discovers how much it costs to hire a booth in the night club. Richard also gatecrashes swimwear fashion week at the Raleigh Hotel, where he speaks to the event manager about the many celebrity parties he has organised

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: Floyd confronts Clark about the affair, while Plumb and Homer uncover new information about Carols past. Black comedy, starring David Harbour, Jason Bateman and Linda Cardellini

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: Shiv weighs a proposal from Matsson ahead of Waystars Investor Day, while Kendall and Roman try to match Logans leadership style

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming examines the hidden histories of cities, revealing the sights and sounds rarely witnessed by the public. He begins in London at St Pauls Cathedral, where he visits a place tourists never go, before exploring a hidden park and a little-known church. He also gets a guided tour of Soho from broadcaster Danny Baker

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming tours the less-celebrated sights of Brighton, beginning by visiting the Toy and Model Museum to look at its collection of model trains. He then discovers a boutique that sells a variety of unusual items, before taking a glimpse behind the scenes at the Royal Pavilion

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor returns to explore more of the worlds most luxurious hotels and begins in Miamis South Beach, home to some of the most hedonistic and extravagant establishments in America. At the Fontainebleau, he meets a man with eye-opening stories about Frank Sinatras regular visits and gets a shock when he discovers how much it costs to hire a booth in the night club. Richard also gatecrashes swimwear fashion week at the Raleigh Hotel, where he speaks to the event manager about the many celebrity parties he has organised

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: Richard E Grant travels to Venice, said to be the city with the highest concentration of luxury hotels on the planet. He discovers how a measuring error led to the building of the citys biggest swimming pool, tries out a 15,000 euro-a-night royal suite whose bed has been slept in by everyone from the Beckhams to Prince Charles and the Duchess of Cornwall, and visits a hotel that keeps its doors open even when water floods to knee height. He also finds out why breaking a window once earned Ernest Hemingway a 10 per cent discount on his room

programme.title: Task
programme.desc: After scaling back his role in the FBI and still reeling from a family tragedy, Special Agent Tom Brandis reluctantly returns to the field to head a new, relatively inexperienced team to investigate a string of robberies in Philadelphia. Following his brothers death, Robbie Prendergrast earns extra cash for his family by ripping off drug dealers - but a bad tip upends his delicate balance. Crime drama, starring Mark Ruffalo

programme.title: Task
programme.desc: As he prepares for an emotional court appearance, Tom buries himself in the case, while Emily questions her obligations to the family. Maeve makes a critical choice to protect her own loved ones, while Robbie works to find a way to turn his newfound surplus into cash

programme.title: The Last of Us
programme.sub-title: When Youre Lost in the Darkness
programme.desc: Twenty years after modern civilisation has been destroyed, a hardened survivor is hired to smuggle a 14-year-old girl out of an oppressive quarantine zone. What starts as a small job soon becomes a brutal, heartbreaking journey, as they both must traverse the US and depend on each other for survival. Starring Pedro Pascal and Bella Ramsey

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: As Prior digs into the links between Tsalal and mining company Silver Sky, Navarro rescues Leah from a local protest that has turned violent. programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming visits Liverpool, cutting through cliches about football and the Beatles to explore its less-celebrated treasures. programme.desc: Fish merchant Robert and his wife Kelly decide to open a seafood restaurant in Brixham - but their determinedly contemporary approach to cuisine leaves some locals unimpressed. The programme also follows the journey of a turbot over 36 hours, as it is caught and auctioned off before being served in an exclusive London restaurant

programme.title: E.T.: The Extra-Terrestrial (1982)
programme.desc: A lonely boy befriends an alien who has been left stranded on Earth. The two develop a psychic connection as the boy helps the extraterrestrial to contact his own people and call for rescue. However, living on Earth starts to have a devastating effect on the visitors health, and a government operative is determined to capture him for study. Steven Spielbergs sci-fi fantasy, starring Henry Thomas, Drew Barrymore, Dee Wallace and Peter Coyote

programme.title: Spy Kids 3-D: Game Over (2003)
programme.desc: Young agent Juni has to go it alone when his big sister Carmen is kidnapped by the evil Toymaker, forcing the plucky junior spy to infiltrate the villains virtual reality world to rescue her. Adventure sequel, starring Daryl Sabara, Alexa Vega, Sylvester Stallone, Antonio Banderas, Ricardo Montalban, George Clooney, Steve Buscemi, Salma Hayek and Elijah Wood

programme.title: Uncharted (2022)
programme.desc: A pair of treasure hunters embark on a globetrotting search for a fortune that was lost 500 years previously, in a race against time against a ruthless rival who claims to be the rightful owner. The quest for fortune and glory sets the younger of the duo on a search for his missing brother. Action adventure, starring Tom Holland, Mark Wahlberg and Antonio Banderas

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island (2012)
programme.desc: A teenager picks up a distress signal originating from the middle of the ocean. Joining an expedition to track the signal to its source, he discovers an unexplored island inhabited by strange creatures, and searches for a way to rescue its sole human inhabitant. Fantasy adventure sequel to Journey to the Centre of the Earth, starring Dwayne Johnson, Michael Caine and Josh Hutcherson

programme.title: Men in Black 3 (2012)
programme.desc: An alien criminal escapes from a prison on the moon and goes back in time on a mission of revenge, changing the course of history. Agent J of the top-secret Earth defence organisation follows him back to 1969, and joins forces with a younger version of his mentor Agent K to set things right. Sci-fi comedy sequel, starring Will Smith, Josh Brolin and Tommy Lee Jones

programme.title: Spy Kids (2001)
programme.desc: A megalomaniac threatens to take over the world, so two married spies come out of retirement to thwart his plans. However, when they go missing, it is up to their plucky children to step in and save the day. Family adventure directed by Robert Rodriguez, starring Antonio Banderas, Carla Gugino, Alan Cumming, Alexa Vega and Daryl Sabara

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: Island of Lost Dreams (2002)
programme.desc: The pint-sized secret agents investigate a mad scientist who has meddled with powerful forces and created a host of bizarre mutant animals. However, the villain is not the only problem they have to face, as another pair of youngsters are determined to outshine them. Family adventure sequel, starring Antonio Banderas, Steve Buscemi and Carla Gugino

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming (2017)
programme.desc: Peter Parker balances life as an ordinary high school student with his superhero alter-ego Spider-Man, while waiting in vain to join his mentor Iron Man on a world-saving mission. Determined to prove he is ready for bigger challenges, he investigates a spree of crimes committed with advanced weapons - leading him into a battle with a ruthless winged enemy on the hunt for priceless technology. Superhero adventure, starring Tom Holland, Michael Keaton and Robert Downey Jr

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

Animated comedy, with the voices of Mike Myers, John Lithgow, Cameron Diaz, Eddie Murphy and Vincent Cassel

programme.desc: A chosen one with mastery of the four elements is charged with keeping the peace between four nations. When he disappears while still a boy, one of these factions sees a chance to gain absolute power and wages war on the others. After 100 years, the chosen one is found and must find a way to restore harmony. Fantasy adventure based on the cartoon series, starring Noah Ringer and Dev Patel.

programme.title: The Golden Compass (2007)
programme.desc: Orphan Lyra Belacqua lives in a parallel universe populated by magical and menacing characters. When her best friend becomes the latest in a long line of children to mysteriously vanish, she embarks on a perilous mission to uncover the dark secret behind their disappearance. Fantasy adventure based on Philip Pullmans novel Northern Lights, starring Dakota Blue Richards, Nicole Kidman, Daniel Craig and Eva Green. Featuring the voices of Ian McKellen, Kristin Scott Thomas and Kathy Bates

programme.title: Batman Forever (1995)
programme.desc: The masked crimefighter takes on the twin threats of disfigured maniac Two-Face and insane genius the Riddler, who are plotting to control the brains of the entire world. Meanwhile, an acrobat whose family has been murdered by Two-Face steps up to join Batman in his fight against evil. Superhero adventure sequel, starring Val Kilmer, Tommy Lee Jones, Nicole Kidman, Jim Carrey and Chris ODonnell

programme.title: Shrek 2 (2004)
programme.desc: The grouchy ogre and his new wife Princess Fiona set out on a journey to meet her parents. However, the king and queen are less than impressed with their daughters choice of husband, while a conniving fairy godmother is determined to make sure her own son gets to marry the princess. Animated adventure sequel, with the voices of Mike Myers, Cameron Diaz, Eddie Murphy, Antonio Banderas, John Cleese, Julie Andrews, Jennifer Saunders and Rupert Everett

programme.title: Shrek the Third (2007)
programme.desc: The bad-tempered ogre finds himself in the unwelcome position of being next in line for the throne. Preferring to stay at home in the swamps, he sets out on a quest to find the rightful heir - a rebellious teenager named Artie - and persuade him to face up to his responsibilities as the future king. Meanwhile, the ambitious Prince Charming sees his chance to take the throne. Animated comedy, with the voices of Mike Myers, Cameron Diaz, Justin Timberlake, Eddie Murphy, Antonio Banderas and Rupert Everett

programme.title: The LEGO Movie (2014)
programme.desc: An ordinary man leading a life of blissful ignorance in a city made of the construction toy is mistakenly identified as a chosen one destined to save the universe. He joins a mismatched band of heroes in stopping a plan to fix the world permanently in place. Animated comedy, with the voices of Chris Pratt, Elizabeth Banks, Morgan Freeman and Will Ferrell

programme.title: Back to the Future Part III (1990)
programme.desc: Time-travelling teenager Marty McFly is transported back to the days of the Wild West, where he strives to save his eccentric scientist friend Doc Brown from death at the hands of a villainous gunslinger. Final instalment in the sci-fi comedy trilogy, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Mary Steenburgen and Thomas F Wilson

programme.title: Bookworm (2024)
programme.desc: Mildred, an 11-year-old girl, finds her world turned upside down when her estranged father, a washed-up magician, takes her on a wild adventure. Family comedy, starring Elijah Wood and Nell Fisher

programme.title: Super Charlie (2024)
programme.desc: Willies dream of fighting crime with his cop dad is shattered when his baby brother Charlie arrives. And the new family member turns out to have superpowers. Family animation, with the voices of Karen Ardiff and Alex Kelly

programme.title: Icefall (2025)
programme.desc: A game warden captures a poacher, only to discover hes aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars frozen in a lake. Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman, Bashar Rahal, Danny Huston, and in one of his last films, Graham Greene

programme.title: Adulthood (2025)
programme.desc: Two siblings discover a dead body, long buried in their parents basement, sending them down a rabbit hole of crime and murder. Comedy drama, starring Josh Gadd, Kaya Scodelario and Billie Lourd, with Alex Winter who also directed

programme.title: Sketch (2025)
programme.desc: When a young girls sketchbook slips into a mysterious pond, her drawings burst into life. As her once-quiet town spirals into chaos, she and her divided family must come together to track down the creatures they never meant to unleash. Writer/director Seth Worleys fantasy comedy, starring Tony Hale and DArcy Carden

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, theyre swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: Hostages (2025)
programme.desc: After an explosion at a London hotel, three people are swept up in the chaos. As rumours circulate that the blast was a terrorist attack, their story gathers momentum on social media and across the rolling 24-hour news cycle. Writer/director Jim Owens comedy thriller, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Tanya Moodie and Nicholas Asbury

programme.title: Nobody 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Former assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed holiday, but soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a bloodthirsty crime boss. Comedy thriller, starring Bob Odenkirk, Connie Nielsen and Christopher Lloyd

programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. Paul Thomas Andersons Oscar-winning action thriller loosely based on Thomas Pynchons novel Vineland, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, an Academy Award-winning Sean Penn, and Benicio del Toro

programme.desc: Mild-mannered war veteran Lee Walker plans a life of quiet domesticity in California with his wife Muriel and younger brother Julius. Restless after an early discharge from the US Army, Julius steals money from Lee to seek his fortune in Nevada, where he lands a job in security at a casino and sparks forbidden desire with co-worker Henry, which is consummated away from prying eyes. Back in their hotel room, Julius and Henry fantasise about using the same underhand tactics as card sharps to line their pockets. Drama, starring Daisy Edgar-Jones, Jacob Elordi and Will Poulter

programme.title: Materialists (2025)
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a clients wedding, Lucy meets the grooms brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Songs romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Coyotes (2025)
programme.desc: Trapped in their Hollywood Hills home, a family fights for survival when caught between a raging wildfire and a pack of savage coyotes. Comedy thriller, starring Justin Long, Mila Harris and Brittany Allen

programme.title: Murdered at First Sight
programme.desc: The story of 19-year-old Celine Figard, who accepted a ride from a lorry driver, but never made it to her destination. Ten days later, her body was found

programme.title: Worlds Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The story of Velma Barfield, the first woman to be executed by lethal injection after taking six lives, asking what drove her to commit these callous murders

programme.title: The Real CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The brutal murder of oil heiress Jill Halliburton Su, and how crime scene detectives uncovered dark secrets about the Halliburton family as they investigated her seemingly perfect life

programme.title: Highway Cops
programme.desc: There is trouble for speeding tourists who take a corner way too fast, and also for a man who tries to cheat the registration system when he is caught out by his ex-wife

programme.title: Highway Cops
programme.desc: Near Dunedin, a driver claims to be sober despite having thrown up in his car. Also, a minivan ends up on its side and a biker gets schooled on the rules of the road

programme.title: Brit Cops
programme.desc: Focusing on the work of the City of London police as they tackle crime on the streets of the capital

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: Footage of car crime and ways it can be prevented, featuring a suspicious-looking man whos wearing two sets of clothes, and youths who run slap-bang into the arms of the shows cameraman after stealing a car

programme.title: A1: Britains Longest Road
programme.desc: Astronaut Tim Peakes space craft is launched up the A1, a police pursuit of a suspected stolen vehicle leads to arrests and a stranded lorry with a blowout causes problems

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Dominic Littlewood hosts the programme that reveals the innovative methods that police officers and members of the public are using to catch criminals in the act. Including footage of a workman who stole a dumper truck and rampaged through the Norfolk countryside and a thief who took two charity tins for sick children, but made a crucial error

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: Dom Littlewood investigates the case of a deaf girl traumatised to find burglars in her home, and an OAP whose carers steal from him, but they get caught out by an ingenious plan

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: A burglar trying to steal laptops is caught out, while a Scottish corner shop owner is the victim of an armed robbery, and his daughter fears for his life. With Dominic Littlewood

programme.title: Brit Cops
programme.desc: Police officers in west Wales deal with violent drunks and drug dealers, as well as a dangerous domestic incident

programme.title: Britains Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: A profile of John Duffy and David Mulcahy, who terrorised the south of England in the 1980s with a string of attacks on women and children near railway stations

programme.title: Killer in My Village
programme.desc: The case of 29-year-old student Mingzi Yang, brutally killed by her ex-husband Wai Hong Tsang in Lincoln in June 2014. Evidence of domestic abuse eas found dating back to when the couple married in 2007

programme.title: Killer in My Village
programme.desc: The tragic story behind the killing of Yvonne McCann, murdered by her husband after a row at home in 2020

programme.title: Killing Mum and Dad
programme.desc: Crime documentary investigating cases of couples murdered by their own children. The first episode focuses on Stephen Seddon, who tried to kill his parents in a fake crash, but was then hailed as a hero for saving them. But his evil intentions hadnt got him anywhere

programme.sub-title: Heriberto Seda - The New York Zodiac
programme.desc: The story of Heriberto Seda, a killer who goaded police and media during his spree and who claimed to kill based on his victims star signs

programme.title: Britains Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: A profile of serial killer Dale Cregan, who was sentenced to life in prison after the senseless murders of two men and two police officers in 2012

programme.title: Killer in My Village
programme.desc: Friends of French film-maker Laureline Garcia-Bertaux were concerned when she failed to turn up to work - unaware she had been killed by her boyfriend and buried in a shallow grave

programme.title: Killer in My Village
programme.desc: The murder of 17-year-old Terry Edmonds, last seen getting off a train in Tunbridge Wells in 2006, and the painstaking forensic evidence used to unmask the teenagers killer

programme.title: Worlds Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: The story of Diane Downs, the Arizona-born mother of three who in 1983 arrived at hospital, having murdered one of her children and left her remaining two critically injured

programme.title: Britains Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: After striking up a friendship in prison for previous murders, Stephen Unwin and William McFalls release had awful consequences

programme.title: The Torso Killer
programme.desc: Bergen County, NJ, Chief of Detectives Robert Anzilotti sets out on a mission to tie relatively unknown serial killer Richard Cottingham to additional murders

programme.title: The Torso Killer
programme.desc: Detective Robert Anzilotti continues his mission to tie Cottingham to additional murders and to get him to confess to more cold-case homicides

programme.title: Forensics: Catching the Killer
programme.desc: Experts analyse sand found in a car after a man goes missing, leading them to a body and a twisted murder case

programme.desc: Police call on multiple units and the Eagle helicopter as they hunt for a stolen vehicle, and a cyclist cannot quite comprehend why he should not ride his bike on the motorway

programme.desc: Focusing on the work of police officers in Devon and Cornwall as they tackle street crime

programme.desc: The story of MoviePass, the company that offered cinema tickets at a discounted rate. programme.desc: In 2016, multiple witnesses in and around the village of Pentyrch, south Wales, saw a vast triangular UFO appearing in the night sky, ejecting smaller red and green craft before engaging in a battle with the RAF, culminating in its apparent shooting down. The presenter and astrophysicist Sarah Cruddas examine video evidence of the alleged UFO crash site and consider natural phenomena before speaking to UFO investigator Gari Jones from the Swansea UFO Network, who has failed to get a clear explanation from the military of these events

programme.title: Digging Up Britains Past
programme.sub-title: Invincible - The Royal Navys Greatest Ship
programme.desc: Raksha Dave and Alex Langlands examine the history of HMS Invincible, which was captured from the French in 1747 and helped transform the Royal Navy with the lessons it taught about organisation and ship design. programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: Yttygran Island in the easternmost tip of Russia is home to the Whale Bone Alley, a 550m stretch of land where giant whale bones and skulls dot the landscape like strange, ancient standing stones

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice
programme.desc: Archaeologists discover an unusual man-made rock formation in the remote Altai Mountains of Russia, and conducting a further excavation, unearth an ancient log cabin and the mummified remains of two bodies buried deep in the frozen permafrost

programme.title: Killer Kings
programme.desc: Emperor Nero, the Antichrist who killed Christians for fun. Nero was 17 when he ascended to power in AD 54 following the death of his step-father, Claudius. Fourteen chaotic, blood-spattered years later it was all over, Nero dying - perhaps by his own hand - at the climax of a rebellion against his rule

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Dan and Laura are on the hunt for better units and better buyers. Rene tries to capitalise on warehouse sales and nabs a deal.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Back in Montebello, Brandi and her buddy set the wayback machine and discover a roaring good time. Darrell makes the most of the little hes got, while Kenny fills his piggy bank, while courting an unfamiliar pastime

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.sub-title: A Roman Mystery and Waterloos Disappearing Dead
programme.desc: Alice Roberts meets an archaeology team in Lincoln who are looking for more evidence about a Roman occupation along a road that leaves the city. She also visits Norfolk to explore an Iron Age hillfort, discovering how 4th-century Romans used it despite being built in the Iron Age. At a small community dig in Lincolnshire, Alice learns about a newly found object - a Roman dodecahedron, and discusses its possible functions with a renowned expert in the digging tent

programme.title: The Last Hunt for Nazi Gold
programme.desc: Guy Walters and Justine Ostrowska embark on a 4,000-kilometre journey across Europe, chasing legends of hidden Nazi treasure. From the mines of Germany and the Amber Room mysteries of Czechia, to stolen art in Austria, the Gold Train myths of Poland, bunker hunts in Italy, and the infamous waters of Lake Toplitz, their search combines discovery and eccentric encounters

programme.title: Digging Up Britains Past
programme.desc: In 1592, Elizabeth I visited Sudeley Castle in the Cotswolds for a three-day party commemorating the nations victory over the Spanish Armada. Here, Raksha Dave, Alex Langlands and assorted volunteers and archaeologists hunt for a lost garden planted as part of the celebrations, while there is also a visit to Kenilworth Castle to investigate an Elizabethan garden still in full bloom today. Plus, a look at how the gardens Tudor owner, Robert Dudley transformed his estate to win favour with his Queen

programme.title: Digging Up Britains Past
programme.desc: Archaeologists and presenters Raksha Dave and Alex Langlands join a team from Reading University at a site in Silchester, near Reading, as they examine one of the best-preserved Roman sites in Britain

programme.title: Digging Up Britains Past
programme.desc: Archaeologists conduct a dig at Auckland Castle in Co Durham, which 700 years ago was home to a group of power-crazed bishops who behaved more like warriors than religious leaders. The experts head to Dirleton Castle in East Lothian to reveal the role one of the men played in defending England from William Wallaces army, and also try their hands at the art of stained glass-making, and fire a working trebuchet - the ultimate medieval weapon of war

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Jersey connect with real-life heavy metal hero Chip whose lifelong passion for steel mills has turned into a stockpile of industrial relics

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: The odds are stacked against four bladesmiths when they must each forge a chopper in a distinct Damascus pattern. The ladder to success is full of twists as they struggle to achieve the specific look of each pattern. After surviving an intense round of testing, two smiths return home to recreate one of the most widely used and dangerous medieval weapons - the Falchion

programme.title: Secret Sex Lives of Tyrants
programme.desc: Uncovering Josef Goebbels public devotion and private hypocrisy, revealing how obsession, control and propaganda shaped power in Nazi Germany

programme.title: Hitlers Secret Sex Life
programme.desc: The myriad of rumours, theories and disputed historical accounts of Adolf Hitlers sexual psychology, exploring the impact of his alleged and proven sex life on his behaviour. This episode delves into the truth behind the rumours of Hitlers sex life, including whispers of homosexuality, voyeurism and sadomasochism

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: Ross is joined by maritime archaeologist Mallory Haas in Plymouth to deep dive on the wreck site of 36-gun Nelsonian frigate HMS Amethyst - a legendary battle cruiser, launched in 1799, which proved one of the most successful and prolific of the Napoleonic wars. Ross makes an incredible discovery using an underwater metal detector, and the historic item reveals why the ship was such a potent weapon of war, but also gives clues as to how and why it sank

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Shipwreck Treasure Hunter
programme.desc: The actor travels dives even deeper on shipwrecks of major historical importance, exploring the remnants of some of the most significant moments in British history. He dives on shipwrecks around the British coastline to reveal some of the nations murkiest and best-kept secrets, beginning with the site of Britains most famous wreck - the Mary Rose. Ross is accompanied by dive master Neil Brock and tank expert and safety diver Mark Culwick

programme.title: Attenboroughs Journey
programme.desc: Documentary following David Attenborough as he journeys around the world to make his series First Life, which explores the origins of life on Earth. As he visits locations including the Great Barrier Reef, the deserts of Morocco and the glaciers of Canada, the broadcaster and wildlife expert explains his life-long fascination with the natural world, and also travels back to Leicestershire, the county in which he spent his childhood

programme.title: Africas Wild Year
programme.desc: A four-part journey through Africa to experience the seasons that shape the continent. Spring in southern Africa brings long days and high temperatures, as the natural world flurries into life, transforming the continent on land and in the cold waters of the rugged coastlines. Before long, animals and plants make an an effort to reproduce and raise their young before summer dries out the lakes and rivers and takes its uncompromising hold on the planes

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective (1994)
programme.desc: An eccentric but brilliant former cop sets himself up to champion the underdog - as a private eye specialising in locating missing animals. The zany detective is called in to find a kidnapped dolphin - the mascot of an American football team - and uncovers a plot involving high-level police corruption. Comedy, starring Jim Carrey, Courteney Cox, Sean Young, Tone Loc and Noble Willingham

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber (1994)
programme.desc: Dimwitted Rhode Island limousine driver Lloyd Christmas and his equally vacuous friend Harry Dunne embark on a disaster-fraught cross-country trip to Aspen, where they hope to reunite a briefcase with its female owner. However, the pair are unaware the case contains a $1million ransom they would have been better leaving well alone. Farrelly brothers comedy, starring Jim Carrey, Jeff Daniels, Lauren Holly, Teri Garr and Mike Starr

programme.title: Dumb and Dumberer: When Harry Met Lloyd (2003)
programme.desc: The half-witted duo meet for the first time as teenagers and band together to face the perils of high school - and prove they are intelligent enough to leave remedial classes behind. Comedy prequel, starring Eric Christian Olsen, Derek Richardson, Rachel Nichols, Eugene Levy and Mimi Rogers

programme.title: Blades of Glory (2007)
programme.desc: A bad-boy figure skater and his effeminate arch-enemy are banned from the sport after their intense rivalry results in a brawl. However, the pair find a loophole in the regulations allowing them to enter the world championships as the first ever same-sex pair - if they can put aside their differences long enough to compete. Comedy, starring Will Ferrell, Jon Heder, Will Arnett and Amy Poehler

programme.title: Hope Springs (2012)
programme.desc: A middle-aged married woman feels her long-standing relationship with her unadventurous husband is becoming stale. When she hears of a marriage counsellor offering therapy sessions in his remote retreat, she persuades her reluctant spouse to join her for a week with the doctor rediscovering why they fell in love in the first place. Romantic comedy, with Meryl Streep, Tommy Lee Jones and Steve Carell

programme.title: The Estate (2022)
programme.desc: Two sisters attempt to win over their terminally ill, difficult-to-please aunt in the hope of becoming the beneficiaries of her wealthy estate, only to find the rest of their greedy family members have the same idea. Comedy, starring Toni Collette, Anna Faris, David Duchovny and Kathleen Turner

programme.title: Caddyshack (1980)
programme.desc: A host of weird and wacky characters cause mayhem at an exclusive golf club, including a laid-back professional player, an obnoxious millionaire, the snobbish club president, a motley collection of teenage caddies and a psychotic groundskeeper engaging in a fight to the death with a canny gopher. Comedy, starring Chevy Chase, Bill Murray, Michael OKeefe and Rodney Dangerfield

programme.title: The Naked Gun (2025)
programme.desc: Following in the footsteps of his legendary father, Frank Drebin Jr must save his police department by solving a case. Comedy reboot, starring Liam Neeson, Pamela Anderson and Danny Huston

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad! (1988)
programme.desc: While investigating the shooting of a colleague, disaster-prone police lieutenant Frank Drebin uncovers a plot to assassinate the Queen during her visit to Los Angeles. However, after he is sacked from the force by the mayor, the cop has to operate beneath the radar to get to the bottom of the conspiracy. Comedy, with Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley and Ricardo Montalban

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear (1991)
programme.desc: Blundering cop Frank Drebin discovers a secret conspiracy to kidnap a renowned solar energy expert and replace him with an imposter. As he sets out to bring the perpetrators to justice, he is unexpectedly reunited with an old flame. Slapstick comedy sequel, starring Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley, George Kennedy, Richard Griffiths and OJ Simpson.

programme.title: Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult (1994)
programme.desc: Inept police detective Frank Drebin plans to retire from the force, but is lured back by the opportunity to foil a terrorist plot. Going undercover in prison, he sets out to prevent an evil mastermind from escaping and carrying out his fiendish plan - to bomb the Oscar awards ceremony. Comedy sequel, starring Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley, OJ Simpson, George Kennedy and Fred Ward

programme.title: Mamma Mia! (2008)
programme.desc: A former member of a singing trio, now running a hotel on a Greek island, is reunited with her old bandmates for her daughters wedding - but is surprised when three of her old flames also show up unexpectedly. The three men have been invited by the bride, who wants to find out which one of them is her father. Musical comedy, with a soundtrack of Abba songs, starring Meryl Streep, Pierce Brosnan, Julie Walters, Colin Firth, Stellan Skarsgard and Amanda Seyfried

programme.title: Miss Congeniality (2000)
programme.desc: A feminist FBI agent is sent undercover as a contestant in the Miss United States pageant when the event becomes the target of a terrorist bomb threat. As she is not exactly catwalk material, a veteran British coach is brought on board to oversee her transformation into a glamorous beauty queen. Comedy, starring Sandra Bullock, Michael Caine, Benjamin Bratt, Candice Bergen and William Shatner

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous (2005)
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie Hart is taken off active duty and made the face of the bureaus publicity campaign, but would rather catch crooks than be the focus of media attention - so when her friends are kidnapped, she disobeys orders to run her own undercover investigation with the help of a short-tempered colleague. Comedy sequel, starring Sandra Bullock, Regina King, William Shatner and Heather Burns

programme.title: Caddyshack (1980)

programme.title: Zoolander (2001)
programme.desc: Dim male model Derek Zoolander is stunned to find his career going downhill thanks to the arrival of an equally vacuous rival - but fails to realise he is merely a pawn in a dangerous game of international espionage and world domination. Comedy, starring Ben Stiller, Owen Wilson, Will Ferrell, Milla Jovovich, Christine Taylor and David Duchovny

programme.title: Zoolander 2 (2016)
programme.desc: Dim-witted supermodels Derek Zoolander and Hansel McDonald must step back into the spotlight and save the day when a maniacal villain starts murdering some of the worlds most beautiful pop stars. Comedy sequel, starring Ben Stiller and Owen Wilson, with Penelope Cruz, Will Ferrell and Kristen Wiig

programme.desc: Two teenage friends are on the brink of going to different colleges, so decide to mark the event by going to a party where they hope to lose their virginity. However, they have promised to supply the booze for the event, a task that proves much harder than expected because they are under age. Unfortunately, when a friend steps in to help, the situation gets even worse. Comedy, starring Jonah Hill, Michael Cera and Christopher Mintz-Plasse

programme.title: American Pie (1999)
programme.desc: Four teenage lads make a solemn pact to lose their virginity before the high-school prom. Though their antics cause them huge embarrassment and public humiliation, the friends also learn about love and affection in their relations with the opposite sex. Coming-of-age comedy, starring Jason Biggs, Shannon Elizabeth, Chris Klein, Alyson Hannigan, Mena Suvari, Seann William Scott and Eugene Levy

programme.title: American Pie 2 (2001)
programme.desc: The teenagers reunite after their first year at college to spend the summer at a lake house. programme.desc: Part two of two. The search for fragments of an ancient Vulcan super-weapon reaches its end, as Riker wins the mercenaries confidence by helping them attack the Enterprise, but his reward is a challenge to kill Picard. Patrick Stewart, Jonathan Frakes and Robin Curtis star

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.sub-title: Treachery, Faith and the Great River
programme.desc: Odo risks his own neck to protect an unexpected defector, while Nog helps OBrien with an enterprising plan. Starring Avery Brooks and Rene Auberjonois

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The team heads for the planet Euronda in response to a plea for help, and soon discovers the inhabitants are in dire straits - but while ONeill is quick to place all his resources at their disposal, Daniel has reservations. Sci-fi adventure, starring Richard Dean Anderson and Michael Shanks

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A failed jewellery store robbery results in a murder that results in three coins being retrieved from a dead thiefs stomach. It seems that the coins have an unsettling effect on whoever possesses them, and Hank and Captain Renard soon begin to exhibit unusual behaviour. Elsewhere, an old friend of Aunt Maries comes to Nick with information about the circumstances of his parents death. Fantasy drama, starring Russell Hornsby

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick searches for a dragon-like monster that has killed two men in a warehouse with its fiery breath, but finds himself having to fend off the seductive advances of the creatures manipulative daughter. Fantasy drama, starring Russell Hornsby, with Danielle Panabaker

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Return of the post-apocalyptic drama, starring Andrew Lincoln. After escaping from the Centre for Disease Control only seconds before it self-destructs, Rick and the group head for a military base, but find themselves fighting off a horde of zombies. When the dust settles, Sophia is nowhere to be seen, and the search for her leads to disaster for Ricks son Carl

programme.title: Warehouse 13
programme.desc: After being saved from Warehouse 2 by Artie, Pete and Myka leave Egypt to find out which artefact HG Wells was searching for - and uncover a chilling plan. Sci-fi drama, starring Eddie McClintock and Joanne Kelly

programme.title: Warehouse 13
programme.desc: Pete, Myka and HG fly out to Egypt to shut down Warehouse 2, which has become active - and put the life of Mrs Frederic in danger. Drama, starring Eddie McClintock and Joanne Kelly

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Return of the post-apocalyptic drama, starring Andrew Lincoln.
